let GOOBER_ID = '_goober'; let ssr = { data: '' }; /** * Returns the _commit_ target * @param {Object} [target] * @returns {HTMLStyleElement|{data: ''}} */ export let getSheet = (target) => { if (typeof window === 'object') { // Querying the existing target for a previously defined <style> tag // We're doing a querySelector because the <head> element doesn't implemented the getElementById api let el = (target ? target.querySelector('#' + GOOBER_ID) : window[GOOBER_ID]) || Object.assign(document.createElement('style'), { innerHTML: ' ', id: GOOBER_ID }); el.nonce = window.__nonce__; if (!el.parentNode) (target || document.head).appendChild(el); return el.firstChild; } return target || ssr; };
